spec.postcondition: (ensures result == 0 || result > 0; result == 0 means the current task is not attached to nd; result > 0 means the current task is attached to nd and result equals the open_count for that task's slot) && (({ int slot = npid_find_process_slot_by_task(nd); slot == -1 ? result == 0 : result == nd->attached_processes[slot].open_count; }))
